title: The Real Mechanics Behind Automated Ebook Delivery After Crypto Payment — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, or any other countries where PayPal is blocked, you're likely stuck with limited options for selling ebooks, courses, and other digital products online. What's more, you're probably tired of being locked out of popular platforms like Gumroad and Payhip due to their restrictive policies. Meet your new solution: the automated ebook delivery system powered by the Core Shop Engine, a revolutionary backend that eliminates the need for PayPal and other traditional payment processors.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Automated ebook delivery after crypto payment is not just a feature; it's a game-changer for digital creators struggling with geographic restrictions, banking limitations, or KYC requirements. With the Core Shop Engine, you can sell your ebooks and other digital products without relying on PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip. This means you can focus on creating content, while the Core Shop Engine handles the backend tasks, including automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The Core Shop Engine uses advanced bot engine technology to automate the delivery of your ebooks and other digital products after a crypto payment is made. This process involves several key components, including the Core Shop Engine's backend, the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend, and the Admin Dashboard for transaction logs and order management. Together, these components enable seamless and secure automated delivery, without the need for manual intervention or reliance on traditional payment processors.
Who This Is Built For and Why

The Core Shop Engine is designed for digital creators who need a reliable and scalable solution for selling ebooks, courses, and other digital products online. Whether you're a solo developer, a small business owner, or a large enterprise, this system provides a flexible and cost-effective way to accept crypto payments and deliver digital products to your customers. By eliminating the need for PayPal and other traditional payment processors, the Core Shop Engine helps you avoid fees, restrictions, and other limitations that can stifle your online sales.
Automated ebook delivery after crypto payment is not just a feature, it's a game-changer for digital creators stuck with PayPal restrictions.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The Core Shop Engine consists of several key components, including the Full Stack Bundle, which includes the Core Shop Engine backend, the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend, and the Admin Dashboard. This bundle provides everything you need to set up an automated ebook delivery system, including automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. Additionally, the Admin Dashboard offers real-time analytics, transaction logs, and order management, making it easy to track your sales and customer activity.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To get started with the Core Shop Engine and automated ebook delivery, follow these steps: sign up for a Core Shop Engine account, set up your store with the Full Stack Bundle, connect your Web3 Wallet Connect frontend, and start selling your ebooks and other digital products. As you begin to accept crypto payments, the Core Shop Engine will automatically deliver your digital products to your customers, providing seamless and secure transactions. Visit https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to explore the Core Shop Engine and start building your automated ebook delivery system today.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
The Core Shop Engine is designed to eliminate fees, restrictions, and other limitations that can stifle your online sales.
